item.title: Contact
item.description:
Thank you for your interest in me and my work. If you have any questions, need further information, or just want to get in touch, I look forward to hearing from you.

The easiest way to reach me is by sending a message on my LinkedIn profile. Simply click on the link below and send me a message. I will get back to you as soon as possible.

LinkedIn-Profil

I look forward to hearing from you!

item.title: Experience
item.description:
With an impressive track record across the globe, I have successfully executed cutting-edge projects in Malaysia, Saudi Arabia, Mexico, Oman and Germany. From developing innovative applications to designing robust enterprise solutions, I have delivered exceptional results within the specified durations. Explore my featured projects and discover how my expertise and dedication has empowered businesses in diverse industries across continents.

Freelancer
Senior .NET Consultant, MCITP, MCTS, SCRUM Master
location: worldwide since: 16 years 9 months
2025
EnBW (Energie Baden-Württemberg AG)
location: Cologne / Karlsruhe, Germany since: 6 years
2025
Parental Leave
location: Japan, South-Korea, United Arab Emirates, South-Africa duration: 1 year
2019
EnBW (Energie Baden-Württemberg AG)
location: Cologne / Karlsruhe, Germany duration: 3 years 9 months
2018

Disclaimer: Link to heading

The information provided on this website is for general informational purposes only. While we strive to keep the information accurate and up to date, we make no representations or warranties of any kind, express or implied, about the completeness, accuracy, reliability, suitability, or availability with respect to the website or the information, products, services, or related graphics contained on the website for any purpose. Any reliance you place on such information is therefore strictly at your own risk.

item.title: Philosophy
item.description:
With over 20 years of experience in crafting and delivering enterprise-scale applications, I bring a wealth of knowledge and expertise to the table. As a freelance Cloud Engineer and DevOps specialist, I am dedicated to helping businesses leverage the power of modern technologies to achieve their goals efficiently and securely.

My philosophy revolves around the core principle of continuous improvement. I strongly believe that technology is ever-evolving, and staying ahead of the curve is essential to drive innovation and deliver exceptional results. I strive to stay at the forefront of the latest advancements in cloud computing, infrastructure automation, and DevOps methodologies to provide my clients with cutting-edge solutions.

item.title: Publications
item.description:
Explore a collection of my top-notch plugins, extensions, and transformative talks I have provided to the community in the last copule of years.

Fake the Unfakeable

Talk about Isolating Code Under Test with Microsoft Fakes©

Find slides here and modules on GitHub

2014
Was dir Trivialbeispiele in Async and Await nicht sagen!

Talk about evolution of asynchronous development and patterns when using async/await

Find slides here and modules on GitHub

2014
ASP.NET MVC NUnit

An Visual Studio extension which adds a project and an item template to generate NUnit based tests of ASP.NET MVC 3 and ASP.NET MVC 4 applications. NUnit as NuGet package reference is already is included.

item.title: Skills
item.description:
<script src="//devil-engineering.de/js/d3.js"></script>
<script src="//devil-engineering.de/js/d3.layout.cloud.js"></script>
<script type="text/javascript"> var skills = [ ".NET", "Agile", "API Management", "ASP.NET MVC", "ASP.NET WebApi", "AppConfiguration", "Azure AppServices", "Azure Functions", "Azure DevOps", "Azure Pipelines", "Backbone.js", "C", "C#", "C++", "CosmosDB", "Docker", "EMC Centera", "Elastic jobs", "Entity Framework", "Event Grid", "FluentAssertions", "Helm", "Java", "Javascript", "keda.sh", "Kubernetes", "KQL", "Marionette.js", "MongoDB", "Moq", "MSTest", "NUnit", "PHP", "PRISM", "Python", "Replication", "Rider", "Scrum", "SQL Server", "T-SQL", "TypeScript", "Visual Studio", "WCF", "WF", "WPF", ];
var color = d3.scaleOrdinal(d3.schemePastel1); var layout = d3.layout.cloud() .size([768, 768]) .words(skills.map(function(d) { return {text: d, size: 10 + Math.random() * 90, test: "testing"}; })) .padding(5) .rotate(function() { return (~~(Math.random() * 6) - 3) * 30; }) .spiral("archimedean") .font("Impact") .fontSize(function(d) { return d.size; }) .on("end", draw);
layout.start();
function draw(words) { const width = layout.size()[0]; const height = layout.size()[1];
d3.select("article").select("svg").remove();
const svg = d3.select("article").append("svg") .attr("width", width) .attr("height", height);
const vis = svg.append("g") .attr("transform", "translate(" + (width / 2) + "," + (height / 2) + ")");
const textElements = vis.selectAll("text") .data(words) .enter().append("text") .style("font-size", "1px") .style("font-family", layout.font()) .style("fill", function(d) { return color(d.text.toLowerCase()); }) .attr("text-anchor", "middle") .attr("transform", function(d) { return "translate(0,0)rotate(" + d.rotate + ")"; }) .style("opacity", 1e-6) .text(function(d) { return d.text; });
textElements.transition() .duration(1000) .delay(function(d, i) { return i * 20; }) .style("font-size", function(d) { return d.size + "px"; }) .attr("transform", function(d) { return "translate(" + [d.x, d.y] + ")rotate(" + d.rotate + ")"; }) .style("opacity", 1); } </script>
